no: Use one of the two: Arnel's or de'Arnise, but not both. Nalia at last below is compatible with whichever you install. Nalia at Last
sum: A Standalone Nalia Romance for ToB with a Romance Branch to continue a romance from De'Arnise Romance or Arnel's Nalia Romance

co.n: Nalia at Last: A ToB Romance MoD.
co.tp2n: Nalia at Last: A ToB Romance MoD.

co.scn: Nalia At Last: Romance Theme Soundtrack
